data.title: Implement classify-sc-shape.sh bash classifier
data.description:
Create plugins/dso/scripts/classify-sc-shape.sh — a bash script that reads SC text from stdin and writes pure-code or external-outcome to stdout.

## Classification Logic

Read the full success criterion text from stdin. Pattern-match against signals indicating external/deployed outcomes:

External-outcome signals (any match → print external-outcome):
- Deployment/runtime: 'deployed', 'accessible at', 'running in production', 'hosted at', 'served from', 'reachable at'
- Third-party services: 'Stripe', 'Jira', 'Slack', 'GitHub', 'Salesforce', 'Twilio', 'SendGrid', 'AWS', 'GCP', 'Azure' (case-insensitive)
- External integrations: 'webhook', 'configured in', 'live payments', 'third-party', '3rd party'
- Infrastructure: 'container', 'cluster', 'load balancer', 'certificate', 'DNS'

If no external-outcome signal is found → print pure-code.

## Interface
- Input: SC text on stdin (one criterion at a time)
- Output: stdout = exactly 'pure-code' or 'external-outcome' (no trailing newline issues)
- Exit code: always 0 (classification success), non-zero only on usage error

## Pattern
Follow plugins/dso/scripts/classify-sc-shape.sh (does not exist yet — create it).
Use grep -Ei pattern approach. Script header: #!/usr/bin/env bash followed by set -uo pipefail.
Use _PLUGIN_ROOT via BASH_SOURCE resolution if referencing other plugin files (portability rule).

## TDD Requirement (testing_mode: GREEN)
Make tests/skills/test-brainstorm-shape-heuristic.sh pass (all 4 tests GREEN). Depends on d00a-20ca.

## Acceptance Criteria
- Verify: bash tests/skills/test-brainstorm-shape-heuristic.sh (exit 0 — all 4 tests GREEN)
- Verify: shellcheck plugins/dso/scripts/classify-sc-shape.sh
- Verify: test -x plugins/dso/scripts/classify-sc-shape.sh
- Verify: echo 'deployed to production' | bash plugins/dso/scripts/classify-sc-shape.sh (outputs: external-outcome)
- Verify: echo 'all unit tests pass' | bash plugins/dso/scripts/classify-sc-shape.sh (outputs: pure-code)
